title: Food Additions
description: Makes some Vanilla items edible (Glistering Melon +6) and adds 11 new foods (ex. Boiled Eggs, Cooked Carrot and Tropical Fish). Some features are configurable
body:
About

 

Food Additions makes 7 vanilla items edible and adds 11 new foods that are obtainable through smelting or crafting regular vanilla items (Egg, Sea Pickle, Carrot, etc.). Some items do something upon eating, they have special effects or can give you something. Also adds recipes to get rid of poison from Poisonous Potatoes using Milk and Honey Bottle.

 

Versions for 1.20.1 and higher have additional feature: adds new edible items to the Foods and Drinks tab.

 

🍉 Items

 

Vanilla items:

Name  Nutrition   Saturation  Custom Effect
Glistering Melon Slice 5 7.4 Heals 1 HP upon eating (also edible if player has full hungerbar)
Fermented Spider Eye 4 3.8  
Dragon's Breath 8 8.4 Gives effect Invincibility for 10s
Sugar 1 0.4  
Rabbit's Foot 2 0.8 Can be fed to animals that can eat meat (cats, dogs...)
Phantom Membrane 3 1.8 Can be fed to animals that can eat meat (cats, dogs...)
Popped Chorus Fruit 6 5.2 Doesn't teleport you after eating it

 

 

New items:

Name  Nutrition   Saturation  Custom Effect / Note
Toasted (Cooked) Carrot 6 10.2  
Cooked Tropical Fish 5 4.8 Can be fed to animals that can eat meat (cats, dogs...)
Sea Pickles 5 3.2  
Melted Snow 1 0.1 Obtained through smelting Snow in the Furnace
Baked Snow 2 1.4 Obtained through smelting Snow in the Smoker or through Campfire cooking
Runny Yolk Egg 4 2.4 If config is true -> player has a 25% chance to get 1 - 4 Bonemeal
Soft-Boiled Egg 6 3.6 Same as Runny Yolk Egg
Medium Well Egg 7 5.2 Same as Runny Yolk Egg
Hard-Boiled Egg 9 8.2 Same as Runny Yolk Egg
Three Eggs in a Bowl 12 9.6 If config is true -> player has a 25% chance to get 3 - 12 Bonemeal
Boiled Turtle Egg 8 5.6 Same as Runny Yolk Egg

 

 

『』Commands

/hungerbar - modyfies nutrition (meats) and saturation (highlighted meats when you have Apple Skin installed)

Detailed description:

/hungerbar (nutrition || saturation || both) (add || set) <target> <value(s)>

            - nutrition -> food level („meats“ you see above XP bar)

            - saturation -> food saturation level - determines how fast food level depletes, can’t be seen without AppleSkin mod

            - both -> adds/sets both values

- ex. /hungerbar both set @p 5 10 -> 1st value: nutrition

                                                           2nd value: saturation

            - while using this command, you can set target’s hunger values above 20 (maximum food (saturation) level) (PS: when rejoining the world, values reset to maximum (if higher than 20))

 

꩜ Effects

 

Invincibility: you can't take any damage and mobs don't attack you

 

❓How it works

 

When you hold vanilla item in your main or off hand it changes the item to another one that looks the same as the vanilla one and is edible. When you switch to different slot it changes it back to vanilla one.

 

⇄ Compatibility

 

 

Apple Skin: incompatible - You CAN'T see nutrition/saturation stats of edited vanilla items in GUI, but you CAN see highlighted "meats" when holding the item (edited vanilla)

 

Placeable Items: I added button (default NUM 9) that makes new edible items unedible. When they are unedible you can place items. When pressed again it switches back to edible mode.

 

Recipes of any kind (modded or vanilla): When you can't craft something with the new edible item just place it in your inventory and wait for 1s (wait time depends on game's load).

 

 

📜 Config

 

Currently there are 4 features that you can configure in this mod. You can see them in the list below:

Name Default value (boolean) Note
Eating new edible vanilla items true  
Hungerbar command functionality true  
Get Bonemeal upon eating boiled Eggs false  
Replace edible items (ex. food_additions:sugar) with vanilla (ex. minecraft:sugar) true Don't turn off this option if you don't know what are you doing (may result in compatibility issues)

 

 

🐛 Bugs and Issues

 

If you find some please contact me on Discord: whiterm OR through CurseForge

FA-0

 

When edited vanilla item is held in main-hand and taken from that slot straight into container (chest/crafting table...) the item is still edible and can't be used in crafting recipes or other possible interactions.

Possible solutions:

For you: place the item into your inventory (not hotbar - could also work but inventory is better)

For me (didn't came up with anything better): check every single container for this item and converting it back -> may cause performance issues

 

FA-1

 

If /hungerbar is executed from command block it doesn't display the info message in chat (info message = how many nutrition points has been added to the player)

Possible solutions:

¯\_(ツ)_/¯

 

Planned Features

 

  1. Add option to turn on/off crafting custom items like Boiled Eggs in config.
  2. Maybe I'll add some new Alex's Mobs meats.

 

 

You CAN'T copy this project and say that YOU created it!!! If you want to use any assets or use some core features please contact me. I'll be glad if you will use this mod in modpacks, but don't forget to leave some credits.

 

My other useful projects:

Texture packs: Clear Lava and Water: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/clear-water-and-lava

                         Mr. Totem (Antimated Totem of Undying): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mr-totem

Mods: Shatr (Adds a lots of funny things, 1.16.5): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shatr
